title: Sonship & Identity
description: Understanding the Spirit of Adoption and your identity as an heir of God.

title: The Ministry of the Word
description: Training the spirit man through meditation and applying the Word as a life manual.

title: Foundations of Prayer
description: Developing a lifestyle of prayer as fellowship and communion with the Father.

title: Sensitivity to the Spirit
description: Learning to discern and follow the leading of the Holy Spirit in daily life.

title: Spiritual Gifts
description: Discovering, developing, and deploying your spiritual gifts for Kingdom impact.

title: Dominion through Partnership
description: Understanding the power of covenant relationships and strategic alliances.
